channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3.6%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Rayner settles unpaid tax bill to pave way for leadership bid
item.description: Starmer latest: Rayner settles unpaid tax bill to pave way for leadership bid

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: There's simply no excuse for how vapid this piece is. Starmer is so weak internally at the moment that absolutely nothing is stopping a leadership contender writing a deep, policy-rich piece about what they'd do diffe...
item.description: There's simply no excuse for how vapid this piece is. Starmer is so weak internally at the moment that absolutely nothing is stopping a leadership contender writing a deep, policy-rich piece about what they'd do diffe...

item.title: ITVX: Streeting poised to launch leadership bid as Starmer clings on as PM - ITVX

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Angela Rayner cleared by HMRC over tax affairs as leadership bid heats up

item.title: BBC Politics: 'I've been exonerated': Angela Rayner says HMRC has cleared her over flat stamp duty

item.title: ConservativeHome: Badenoch’s challenge to Labour: do you actually want to govern?

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: EXC from @pippacrerar.bsky.social
Angela Rayner has been cleared by HMRC of deliberate wrongdoing or carelessness over her tax affairs, the Guardian can reveal, paving the way for a potential leadership bid as Keir ...

item.title: FT UK Politics: Angela Rayner says she has been cleared over tax affairs
